name: IM Report: Consumption rate by centre (last 30 days)

properties.sql: SELECT centre.c_code AS centre_code, centre.c_name AS centre_name, COALESCE(dist.c_name, centre.c_district_code, '—') AS district, COUNT(rdm.id) AS redemptions_30d, COALESCE(SUM(CAST(NULLIF(rdm.c_quantity_redeemed, '') AS NUMERIC(15,2))), 0) AS qty_redeemed_30d, COUNT(DISTINCT vch.c_farmer_nid) AS distinct_farmers, COUNT(DISTINCT vch.c_input_code) AS distinct_inputs, MAX(rdm.c_redemption_date) AS last_redemption FROM app_fd_md37collectionPoint centre LEFT JOIN app_fd_md03district dist ON dist.c_code = centre.c_district_code LEFT JOIN app_fd_im_voucher_redemption rdm ON rdm.c_redemption_point = centre.c_code AND NULLIF(rdm.c_redemption_date, '')::date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' LEFT JOIN app_fd_im_voucher vch ON vch.c_code = rdm.c_voucher_code GROUP BY centre.c_code, centre.c_name, dist.c_name, centre.c_district_code HAVING COUNT(rdm.id) > 0 ORDER BY redemptions_30d DESC, centre_name
properties.countSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT centre.c_code) FROM app_fd_md37collectionPoint centre WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM app_fd_im_voucher_redemption rdm WHERE rdm.c_redemption_point = centre.c_code AND NULLIF(rdm.c_redemption_date, '')::date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days')
